---
title: "_03.5_control_selection"
author: "Josefina Weinerova"
date: "2026-02-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

source("R/data_prep.R")
```

# package loading
```{r}
# install.packages("openalexR")
if (!require(pacman)) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(
  openalexR, cowplot, tidyverse, httr, jsonlite,
  citecorp, rcrossref, purrr, dplyr, tibble, fect, furrr, future, data.table,
  panelView, sjrdata
)
```

# data loading

```{r}
all_matched_articles <- readRDS("data/all_matched_articles.rds")
matched_journals <- readRDS("data/matched_journals_pilot.rds")
df_journals <- sjr_journals
df_meta <- readRDS("data/metadata_OpenAlex.rds")
```

# which articles match to which originals
```{r}
matched_journals <- matched_journals %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(issn, sep = "\\s*,\\s*") %>% # split to rows
  mutate(
    year = suppressWarnings(as.integer(publication_year)),
    issn = clean_issn(issn)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(issn), !is.na(year))


not_in_journals <- all_matched_articles %>%
  anti_join(
    matched_journals,
    by = c(
      "issn_l" = "issn",
      "publication_year" = "year"
    )
  )

combination <- merge(all_matched_articles, matched_journals,
  by.x = c("issn_l", "publication_year"), by.y = c("issn", "year"), suffixes = c("", "_j"), all.x = TRUE,
  sort = FALSE
)

combination <- combination %>%
  dplyr::select(issn_l, publication_year, doi, doi_o, sjr_diff)

combination %>% filter(is.na(doi_o))


df_journals
```
# remove rows with missing dois, dois for supplementary material, dois that are for issues instead of articles, book chapters and dois that are themselves a replication in FLoRA
```{r}
nrow(combination)
combination <- combination %>%
  filter(!is.na(doi) & !grepl("\\.supp$", doi))
combination <- combination %>%
  filter(!(doi %in% df_meta$doi_r))
```
# subselect
```{r}
n_controls <- 10L
set.seed(422)
# faster than stringr for big columns
combination <- combination %>%
  mutate(
    doi_o = tolower(trimws(doi_o)),
    doi = tolower(trimws(doi))
  )
head(combination)
# get treated/control

treated_dois <- sample(unique(combination$doi_o))
control_studies <- setdiff(unique(combination$doi), treated_dois)

# scan combination ONCE to get only candidate rows we could ever use
cand <- combination %>%
  filter(
    doi %in% control_studies,
    doi_o %in% treated_dois
  ) %>%
  arrange(doi_o, doi)

cand <- cand %>%
  group_by(doi_o) %>%
  slice_sample(prop = 1) %>%
  ungroup()

cand_split <- split(cand, cand$doi_o)

# O(1) membership test, no growing vector copies
used <- new.env(hash = TRUE, parent = emptyenv())

matched_list <- vector("list", length(treated_dois))
names(matched_list) <- treated_dois

for (i in seq_along(treated_dois)) {
  tid <- treated_dois[i]
  df <- cand_split[[tid]]
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) next

  u <- unique(df$doi) # already ordered by arrange()
  keep <- u[!vapply(u, exists, logical(1), envir = used)]
  sel <- head(keep, n_controls)

  for (x in sel) used[[x]] <- TRUE

  matched_list[[i]] <- df[df$doi %in% sel, ] %>%
    mutate(treated_doi_queried = tid)
}

matched_analysis_df <- bind_rows(matched_list)

# Inspect
head(matched_analysis_df)

# 1) Treated rows that already exist (self-match present)
treated_rows_exist <- combination %>%
  filter(doi == doi_o) %>%
  group_by(doi_o) %>%
  slice_min(abs(sjr_diff), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(treated_doi_queried = doi_o)

# 2) Identify treated DOIs missing a self-match row
missing_treated <- setdiff(unique(combination$doi_o), unique(treated_rows_exist$doi_o))

# 3) Create a synthetic treated row for each missing doi_o
treated_rows_missing <- combination %>%
  filter(doi_o %in% missing_treated) %>%
  group_by(doi_o) %>%
  slice(1) %>% # grabs publication_year (and issn_l) from existing rows for that doi_o
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    issn_l = issn_l,
    publication_year = publication_year,
    doi = doi_o, # <- make treated row
    doi_o = doi_o,
    sjr_diff = 0, # or NA_real_ if you prefer
    treated_doi_queried = doi_o
  )

# 4) Final treated_rows = real self-matches + patched rows
treated_rows <- bind_rows(treated_rows_exist, treated_rows_missing)

# combine treated + matched controls
full_matched_df <- bind_rows(treated_rows, matched_analysis_df)
colnames(full_matched_df)
full_matched_df <- full_matched_df %>%
  distinct(doi, publication_year, .keep_all = TRUE)
# check number of studies for each treated doi
full_matched_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(treated_doi_queried) %>%
  summarise(n_unique = n_distinct(doi), .groups = "drop")

head(full_matched_df)
length(unique(full_matched_df$doi))

```

```{r}
saveRDS(full_matched_df, "data/full_matched_df.rds")
```
